body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-40948", "cvss": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-352", "name": "Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)"}], "description": "The Keycloak authentication manager in `apache-airflow-providers-keycloak` did not generate or validate the OAuth 2.0 `state` parameter on the login / login-callback flow, and did not use PKCE. An attacker with a Keycloak account in the same realm could deliver a crafted callback URL to a victim's browser and cause the victim to be logged into the attacker's Airflow session (login-CSRF / session fixation), where any credentials the victim subsequently stored in Airflow Connections would be harvestable by the attacker. Users are advised to upgrade `apache-airflow-providers-keycloak` to 0.7.0 or later.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00328, "percentile": 0.24565}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-5w6h-pjw6-wvc6", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-22T17:36:41Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5w6h-pjw6-wvc6", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-5w6h-pjw6-wvc6"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40948"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-18T14:16:10Z", "published_at": "2026-04-18T15:34:15Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40948", "https://github.com/apache/airflow/pull/64114", "https://lists.apache.org/thread/kc0odpr70hbqhdb9ksnz42fkqz2xld9q", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/04/17/14", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5w6h-pjw6-wvc6"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/airflow", "summary": "apache-airflow-providers-keycloak: Missing OAuth 2.0 State and PKCE Enables Login CSRF and Session Fixation", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-22T17:36:41Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-5w6h-pjw6-wvc6", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.7.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "apache-airflow-providers-keycloak"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.0.1, < 0.7.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: apache-airflow-providers-keycloak: Missing OAuth 2.0 State and PKCE Enables Login CSRF and Session Fixation
